ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the player */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player (in inches) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player (in pounds) */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" TEXT /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "contract_start_year" INTEGER /* Year the player's contract starts */,
  "contract_end_year" INTEGER /* Year the player's contract ends */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Annual salary of the player */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Status of the player (active, injured, retired, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Home team for the game */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Away team for the game */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (scheduled, in progress, completed, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "regular_season_games" INTEGER /* Number of regular season games */,
  "playoff_games" INTEGER /* Number of playoff games */,
  "champion_team" TEXT /* Champion team of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the role (e.g., admin, coach, analyst) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
column_names: Number of games played by the player
Round in which the player was drafted
Status of the player (active, injured, retired, etc.)
Status of the game (scheduled, in progress, completed, etc.)
Access level of the role (e.g., admin, coach, analyst)
